我認為一個好既programming language, syntax應該要得到最多既注視
所以想從syntax入手去整一個新language, 以下係初步idea

# assignment
num height = 20;

# type assignment: "dyn" means "dynamic"
dyn result;

result := str; # assign type to a variable using :=
result = "turns out to be a string";
result = 255;
# ERROR: result is a str but is assigned a num

result := num;
result = 255;
# valid

# constants
const num MAX_SIZE = 200;
MAX_SIZE += 1;
# ERROR: MAX_SIZE is a const but is assigned a new value

# scope: searching definition from right to left, bottom to top
num width = 127;
num height = 2 * width; # width has value 127

# function definition: treating all functions as variables
num calcArea( num width, num height ) = width * height; # width and height has value whatever is passed to the function, instead of the value defined above
type calcArea;
# calcArea has signature: function ( num, num ) -> num

# "?" as evaluation operator: boolean ? statement [ : optional statement ];


# operation sets: everything between { }


str withSpaces = "i go to school by bus";
str withoutSpaces = delSpace ( withSpaces );
lm

我意思由成個OS 架構都係全新

replies.msg:
兩件事分離做會易好多

Implement 一隻新Language
1. 你要有design 呢到講緊你要具體咁了解啲semantics
簡單一個例子 argument同parameter既分別
你可以參考唔同既language去比較細節
當然你亦都可以完全破舊立新 咁就唔駛去比現有既概念框住 但你有既新概念都必需要具體
尤其係你越加越多feature個時 feature之間既interaction要逐一具體思考
2. 你要識parsing 唔駛好理論派咁識prove係咪context free
但係你要識context free既局限 同埋點樣hack到有context
3. Talk is cheap, do a reference implementation
齋寫個idea 人人都識做 但係細節必須要自己落抙implement先可以填到出黎
唔駛要一個高效既implementation 用到黎做reference implementation就得
4. 識現有tool chain
咁你就可以用現有工具 自己淨係寫個front 就自動得到一個practical implementation

而OS
其實OS implementation真係唔難 不過䌓雜 而且最重要既唔係OS行唔行到 而係生態
難度黎講 一個行到既OS無咩好難明既概念
但係有好多好多野要implement 超多driver
工程管理係一個難點 點test點trace bug 不過一個人整toy OS就相對簡單
生態方面 你商業化既自己諗 open source既就說服大家點解要唔用Linux而要用你

Language compiler OS 都算係一個有野心既programmer想做齊既事
但係真心無必要撈埋一齊 逐樣逐樣做啦

雖然我唔憎打code, 但成日遇到d情況bother我
例如
// TS
let a: number = 1;

唔鍾意佢又 let又number, 所以我整既話就會
Num a = 1;

又例如
const KEY: string = "0101";
我會
const Str KEY = "0101";

又例如
const f : Function = ( a: number, b: bool ) => b ? a + 1 : a - 1;
我會
Fn f = ( Num a, Bool b ) : Num { b ? a + 1 : a - 1; };

表達緊同一樣野, 但明明就可以好簡潔
每個symbol都有意思, 應該盡可能用最少既symbol表達最多既野
相信有人憎打code部份原因都係咁
